title: LAN Player Limit Modifier (LPLM)
description: This mod allows you to change Minecraft's built-in LAN player limit of 8. This includes but is not limited to the Essentials Mod which when hosting, also uses this built-in limit.
body:
## LAN PLAYER LIMIT MODIFIER
Also known as LPLM, this mod allows you to change Minecraft's built-in LAN player limit of 8. This includes but is not limited to the Essentials Mod which when hosting, also uses this built-in limit. This Mod also has ModMenu support (OPTIONAL) to configure the player limit. No other players _need_ this installed, only the host does.

## MOD SUPPORT
If the config cannot be accessed using ModMenu, the configuration file is located in the instance root then ```/config/lplm.json```

This Mod has only been tested on versions:
- MC 1.21.1 (fabric loader 0.17.2)
- MC 1.21.8 (fabric loader 0.17.2)
- MC 1.21.10 (fabric loader 0.17.2)
- MC 1.21.11 (fabric loader 0.18.4)
- MC 26.1.2 (fabric loader 0.19.2)

## ISSUES
**Please put any issues found on the github and I will do my best to fix them!**

Known issues:
- None as of now :3
